description: Pink sling bag crafted from synthetic leather and corduroy with branding on the front One zipped pocket at the front and one pocket below it with a flap and push button closure A shining pink bow in the middle interlaced through the exterior on both sides for aesthetic appeal One large main zipped pocket with an inner zipped pocket on one side One external zipped pocket at the back with a mobile pouch Two elasticated pouches on both sides One long adjustable strap to sling around your shoulder
